title: Cook Kitchen Professional
description: A Cook Kitchen Professional in India works in commercial kitchens, preparing and cooking meals for large groups of people. They follow recipes, manage inventory, and maintain kitchen hygiene. They may work in hotels, restaurants, or catering services, often working long hours, including nights and weekends.
entrance_exams: DTE Maharashtra Hotel Management Entrance Exam

career_progression.year_0_2: Starting as a junior cook, assisting senior chefs, and learning kitchen operations.
career_progression.year_3_5: Moving to a senior cook position, taking charge of kitchen sections, and managing inventory.
career_progression.year_6_10: Becoming a chef de partie, overseeing kitchen operations, and mentoring junior staff.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Starting a small catering business or food truck, leveraging culinary skills and network.
career_progression.global_pathway: Working in international hotels, restaurants, or cruise ships, with opportunities in the Middle East, Europe, and the Americas.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Long working hours, physical demands, and initial struggles to adapt to kitchen environment.
common_misconceptions: Kitchen work is only for men
